market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
articles.description: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

articles.title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
articles.description: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of  turning AI into a business.

articles.title: Exodus to cut 25% of staff in company reorganization
articles.description: The wallet company said it expected the layoffs to generate between $10 million and $13 million in savings as part of its strategy to build a full-stack card issuance and payments platform.

articles.title: Natural raises $30M to reinvent payments for AI agents — and take on Stripe
articles.description: The one-year-old startup aims to reinvent financial architecture for autonomous AI transactions.

articles.title: Hut 8, IREN deals lift AI-focused Bitcoin mining stocks
articles.description: Bitcoin miners rallied as investors cheered multi-billion-dollar AI infrastructure contracts, underscoring the sector’s accelerating shift toward data centers and cloud computing.

articles.title: Nigerian president signs order on approach to crypto regulation, taxes
articles.description: The West African country’s executive order established a virtual asset council and addressed the fragmentation of crypto regulation for oversight and enforcement.

articles.title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
articles.description: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

articles.title: Bitcoin price hits $65K wall as stocks battle ‘record’ institutional tech sell-off
articles.description: Bitcoin faced troublesome resistance at $65,000 while traders still saw a potential BTC price breakout into a “bullish market structure.”

articles.title: Adobe camera app’s new feature will critique your photos using AI
articles.description: Adobe's Project Indigo can now remove all kinds of backgrounds from photos you snap using the app.

articles.title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
articles.description: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

articles.title: IREN jumps 16% after raising AI cloud revenue target above $4B
articles.description: The Bitcoin miner raised its year-end AI cloud revenue target to more than $4 billion after signing $2.8 billion in new contracts with AI developers.

articles.title: Inference startup Infinity raises $15M from Touring Capital, OpenAI and Anthropic researchers
articles.description: AI infrastructure company Infinity announced Monday a $15 million raise at a $100 million valuation from investors including Touring Capital, Principal VC, and researchers from companies such as OpenAI and Anthropic.

articles.title: Hackers stole ‘significant’ amount of data from tech firm relied on by thousands of US hospitals and pharmacies
articles.description: Edinburgh-based tech firm Craneware said customer data was stolen during a cyberattack. The company makes software that thousands of U.S. hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics rely on for billing patients, potentially exposing health data.

articles.title: 新恆星普查結果支持宇宙年齡約 138 億年，化解古老恆星年齡爭議
articles.description: 宇宙年齡約為 138 億年，是現代宇宙學觀測微波背景輻射（CMB）並結合標準宇宙學模型 ΛCDM（Lambda […]

articles.title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
articles.description: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.

articles.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
articles.description: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.

articles.title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
articles.description: The deals sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.

articles.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
articles.description: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
articles.description: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.
